pi_items.source: Verified against export_result.sh line 36 (grep for 'ADT_Audit_HTTP') and task.json description line 17
Verified in setup_task.sh line 44 (-p 6661:6661) and task.json description specifying 'port 6661'
Verified in setup_task.sh lines 23 (mkdir), 52 (volume mount), and export_result.sh line 85 (file check)
Verified via web search - .hl7 is the standard extension for HL7 (Health Level 7) files per https://filext.com/file-extension/HL7

privileged_info_summary: All metadata values are verified. The expected_file_ext '.hl7' is the standard extension for HL7 healthcare messages. The channel_name 'ADT_Audit_HTTP', expected_port '6661', and output_dir '/home/ga/output' are consistently referenced across setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and task.json. The task uses NextGen Connect version 4.5.0 (verified as existing on Docker Hub), processes HL7 ADT^A01 messages (verified as valid message type with correct required segments: MSH, EVN, PID, PV1), and uses default NextGen Connect credentials (admin/admin confirmed as standard defaults). The task operates with synthetic data - an inline HL7 test message provided in the task description.
